description:
A transparent, device-agnostic cardiovascular fitness tracker and analyzer

PAIesque transforms your heart rate data into comprehensive training load and recovery metrics using multiple scientifically-validated methods. Connect via Google Health Connect to track your cardiovascular fitness with complete transparency and privacy.

IMPORTANT UPGRADE NOTICE: Version 2.0 is a complete rewrite. You MUST uninstall any previous version before installing. Gadgetbridge import is no longer supported - the app now exclusively uses Google Health Connect.

What PAIesque Does:

PAIesque calculates four different Training Impulse (TRIMP) methods:

  • Banister TRIMP - The original exponential model with sex-specific coefficients
  • iTRIMP - Individualized TRIMP with customizable b coefficient
  • LT-TRIMP - Lactate Threshold-based model
  • PAI-esque - Our PAI-inspired metric (using EWMA, not the official commercial algorithm)

It also tracks key recovery metrics:

  • Resting Heart Rate (RHR) - Calculated from your defined sleep window
  • Heart Rate Variability (HRV) - Daily RMSSD averages during sleep
  • EWMA trends - Exponentially weighted moving averages for both RHR and HRV
  • ACWR - Acute:Chronic Workload Ratio for injury risk monitoring
  • Polarized Training Score - Measures how closely your training matches your intensity targets

Interactive Features:

  • Layer-based charts - Toggle between TRIMP, 7-day rolling, ACWR/Polarized, RHR, and HRV layers
  • Custom date ranges - Select any time period for analysis
  • Zoom controls - Zoom in/out for detailed examination
  • Save charts - Export as SVG or PNG to your device
  • Educational legend - Dynamic explanations with scientific citations for every element

Comprehensive Settings:

Individual settings screens for each TRIMP method, plus global profile settings for age, gender, fitness level, and HRmax formulas (Shargal, Tanaka, HUNT, Fox). Each includes live preview charts and detailed scientific explanations.

Data Management:

  • Full CSV export/import for all tables
  • Complete database backup and restore
  • All data stays on your device - no accounts, no cloud uploads

Scientific Foundation:

Every feature includes citations to peer-reviewed research:

  • Banister EWMA model [Banister, 1991; Morton et al., 1990]
  • iTRIMP validation [Stagno et al., 2007; Akubat et al., 2012]
  • Lactate threshold science [Mader et al., 1976; Gaesser and Poole, 1986]
  • Polarized training [Seiler and Tønnessen, 2009; Stöggl and Sperlich, 2014]
  • ACWR and injury risk [Murray et al., 2017; Griffin et al., 2021]
  • HRV monitoring [Task Force, 1996; Plews et al., 2013; Buchheit, 2014]

Requirements:

  • Google Health Connect installed on your device
  • Heart rate and/or HRV data in Health Connect from your wearable device
  • Android 8.0 (API 26) or higher

Note on PAI: Our PAI-esque implementation is NOT the official commercial PAI® algorithm (which is proprietary). It uses EWMA and scaled TRIMP values to provide a similar intensity-weighted weekly score. The 100 PAI target remains the evidence-based health outcome from the HUNT Study research.

Privacy: PAIesque is fully offline. Your heart rate data never leaves your device. No accounts, no tracking, no analytics, no internet connection required after installation.

Open Source: PAIesque is free and open source software. Th
